ValidationRule.description: RO-2858 — Prevents editing Partner Contract Start/End Date on Closed Won or Closed Lost opportunities. Only System Administrator can override.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Won"), ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Lost") ), OR( ISCHANGED(Partner_Contract_Start_Date__c), ISCHANGED(Partner_Contract_End_Date__c) ), $Profile.Name <> "System Administrator" )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Partner Contract dates cannot be modified on closed opportunities. Please contact the Salesforce team.
